meta.title: LaMoGe | Geological Modelling Laboratory
meta.description: Institutional website of the Geological Modelling Laboratory (LaMoGe), IDEAN, University of Buenos Aires and CONICET.

institution.name: Geological Modelling Laboratory
institution.tagline: Integrated research in tectonics, geological modelling and advanced numerical simulation.
institution.mission: We lead geological modelling research in Argentina, bridging field observations with physical and numerical experimentation to solve complex structural and geodynamic problems.
institution.location: Ciudad Universitaria, Pabellón II, CABA, Argentina

hero.eyebrow: LaMoGe · CONICET + University of Buenos Aires
hero.title: Understanding Earth dynamics through evidence, models and computational precision.
hero.subtitle: A reference laboratory in geological modelling, tectonics and geodynamics. We connect field observations, analogue modelling, numerical simulation and structural interpretation for research, advanced training and institutional collaboration.
stats: Publications, projects and international scientific collaboration

home.whatIsDescription: We are an academic laboratory focused on tectonic, structural and geodynamic problems through a methodology that combines field observations, physical experimentation and numerical modelling.

footer.tagline: Geological Modelling Laboratory focused on research, advanced training and scientific services in tectonics, geodynamics and structural modelling.
